diary_entries.entry: The dust_devil changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
The dust_devil changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Year 91 on Mars. Dust devil disrupts solar panels. Morale is hopeful. We have 194 food units left.

meta_awareness: Titan (year 91): 'Today I realized: the output of Year 91 is the input to Year 92. We are being data-sloshed.'
